summary: Iteration 29: Backend Bug Fixes Validation - ALL 27 TESTS PASSED. Verified all critical bugs fixed: BUG1 (admin portal access), BUG2 (login token aliases), BUG3 (admin dashboard/giving endpoints), BUG4 (kids checkin history), BUG5 (seeded demo data), CORS headers, and regression endpoints.

BUG1_admin_portal_access.details: admin@abundant.church (role=church_admin) now accesses all portal endpoints without 403. get_current_member_user() correctly allows church_admin role.

BUG2_login_token_aliases.details: POST /api/auth/login now returns session_token, token, AND access_token fields. All three contain the same sess_xxx value. Mobile apps can use any of these fields.

BUG3_admin_endpoints.details: /api/admin/dashboard returns: total_members, active_groups, mtd_giving, ytd_giving, recurring_count, last_sunday_attendance, upcoming_events_count, recent_activity. /api/admin/giving/summary returns: mtd_total, ytd_total.

BUG4_kids_checkin_history.details: Endpoint exists and returns {checkins: [], total: n} structure for authenticated parent.

checks.kids_emma_johnson: Emma Johnson found in children list

CORS_headers.details: CORS middleware correctly configured with allow_origins=['*'], allow_methods=['GET','POST','PUT','DELETE','OPTIONS'], allow_headers=['*']

endpoints: GET /api/auth/me - returns user info with Bearer token

critical_code_review_comments: All bugs verified fixed - no code changes needed
get_current_member_user() line 5569 correctly includes 'church_admin' role for portal access
Login response lines 2415-2417 now include session_token, token, and access_token aliases
/api/portal/kids/checkin/history (line 3767) endpoint exists and returns checkins list
ensure_abundant_mobile_demo_content() seeds correct demo data counts
CORSMiddleware (line 11536) configured with wildcard origins and all methods
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend bugs verified fixed. Key validations: (1) church_admin role can access all portal/* endpoints, (2) login returns session_token/token/access_token, (3) admin/dashboard and admin/giving/summary exist with required fields, (4) portal/kids/checkin/history endpoint works, (5) seeded demo data meets QA requirements. No frontend testing performed per request.

mocked_apis.merch_checkout: Merch products viewable, checkout MOCKED by design
